title: もやもやペラルゴニウム

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Get this, familiar! I found a new friend for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, I've found myself in front of the station with Sweep Tosho
on my day off. About an hour ago...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Familiar, I've been looking all over for you! C'mon, it's time to go
shopping!
choice_data_list: When did I agree to that?!
When did I agree to that?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I just found this today. "Introducing the Magical Doggy, a plushie that
soothes your soul with its adorable eyes—available now!"

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's a magical doggy! I'm so getting my hands on one, so hurry it up,
will you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, we arrive at the nearest toy shop in search of this magical
plushie...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What do you mean it's sold out?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Geez, this is no time to be standing around! Familiar, to the next shop
we go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're sold out too?! How come?! You better not be hiding one in the
back!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
None here, either! Urgh, then the search continues, familiar! We're
going until we find one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, no matter which toy shop we go to, the "Magical
Doggy" plush is sold out.
choice_data_list: If we haven't found one by now, then—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What're you down in the dumps for?! I definitely want one, so
we're not giving up this easily!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, this is all your fault, familiar! If you kept up with me, I
might've been able to buy one before they sold out everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sooo getting my hands on one. Familiar, where's the next store?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep being stubborn is nothing new, but I'm a little curious as to
why she's so adamant on getting this particular toy.
choice_data_list: How come you want this plushie so badly?
How come you want this plushie so badly?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I know I want it, and that's that! I need my own Magical Doggy!
choice_data_list: So the Magical Doggy is special to you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's right! 'Cause Grandma had one just like it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma's Dog
text_block_list.text: Bark, bark!

text_block_list.name: Young Sweep
text_block_list.text: Sob... Hic. Just go away...

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
There's no point in saying things you don't mean. I placed a spell on
her—she can read the minds of others.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: ...What's that? Deep down, Sweepy wants to apologize to her papa?

text_block_list.name: Young Sweep
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's not what I was thinking at all! I mean, there's no way I'd say
sorry to Papa...

text_block_list.name: Young Sweep
text_block_list.text: There's no way... But wow, your magic is so cool Grandma.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Just like Grandma, I want a doggy that can read minds! But I can't
keep pets at the dorm, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's why I want a Magical Doggy. I'll cast a spell on it...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And make it into a mind-reading plushie. Then I'll be one step closer
to becoming a great witch like Grandma!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho wants the plushie because it makes her feel closer to
her grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's gotten dark out already. Sweep might be tired from running
around all day.
choice_data_list: It's getting late, so let's call it here for today.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I just say no to that! Why don't you get it? If you wanna go
home that much, just go by yourself!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next morning, I spot Sweep as I wait by the academy gate and
call out to her.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What, you feel like apologizing now?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday, I bet you looked for only a little bit. You probably
couldn't find it!
choice_data_list:
Then here's a question for you. What could this
be?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What? What do you m—huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hand over the promised present to a speechless Sweep Tosho.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: A Magical Doggy! You really found one?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But, it was sold out everywhere! I totally thought it was a lost cause...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Magical Doggy plushie is really popular, so I had to call a toy
store in the neighboring prefecture to snag one.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You mean you really kept looking after you sent me home?!
choice_data_list:
You need it to become a great witch, don't
you?

You need it to become a great witch, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: For me... to become a witch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying it would help her become a witch was a bit of a stretch, but I
also believed it would give her the push she needed to keep chasing
her dreams.
choice_data_list: Take good care of me! Ruff!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Wh-what am I gonna do with you? Fine then, I'll be your new
master!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well... Y'know? It's only natural for a familiar to work for their master,
right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Even if my familiar didn't find it, I probably would've found it myself,
right?

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer helped you, right? Make sure to say thank you later,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, I don't care! It's not like I asked for help. My familiar did it all
on their own!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I really found myself a weird familiar... Doggy, you think so too, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...What's that face for?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You're wrong! I'm not grateful to them at all, and you're so off the mark!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's enough—you gotta learn how to read minds better, you hear
me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her grumbling, Sweep Tosho hugs her Magical Doggy tightly
and crawls under the covers.
